rationale: Both papers analyze lender behavior on the same Prosper P2P platform, and the cited paper examines how borrower narratives affect funding, pricing, and subsequent repayment outcomes—core decision/performance variables that overlap with the citing paper’s Prosper risk-taking and return analyses. Given this strong domain and outcome overlap (even though we only have title-level matched evidence), the citation is plausibly foundational/comparative rather than an obvious incidental mention.
